title: Tirucalia schimperi
taxonomy: Tirucalia schimperi is a species within the Apocynaceae family and the genus Tirucalia. This plant is native to the tropical regions of East Africa, particularly in countries such as Ethiopia and Somalia. It belongs to the order Gentianales and is classified as a flowering plant. The classification of Tirucalia schimperi places it within the larger group of angiosperms, or flowering plants. Further research may be necessary to determine its exact taxonomic classification.
